CREATE TABLE intervals (id INT PRIMARY KEY, interval_value INTERVAL MINUTE);
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL '5 minutes' - INTERVAL '30 seconds');
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (2, INTERVAL '10 minutes' + INTERVAL '45 seconds');
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (3, INTERVAL '0 minutes');
SELECT id, interval_value FROM intervals WHERE interval_value > INTERVAL '4 minutes';
SELECT id, interval_value FROM intervals WHERE interval_value < INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND id > 1;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, start_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL MINUTE);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-10 10:00:00', INTERVAL '30 minutes');
INSERT INTO events VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-10 11:00:00', INTERVAL '15 minutes');
SELECT e.event_id, e.start_time, e.start_time + e.duration AS end_time FROM events e WHERE e.start_time + e.duration > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-10 10:30:00';
SELECT e.event_id, e.start_time, e.start_time + e.duration AS end_time FROM events e JOIN intervals i ON e.duration = i.interval_value WHERE i.id = 1;
CREATE VIEW extended_events AS SELECT e.event_id, e.start_time, e.duration, e.start_time + e.duration AS end_time FROM events e WHERE e.duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM extended_events WHERE end_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-10-10 12:00:00' ORDER BY start_time DESC;
SELECT e.event_id, e.start_time, e.duration FROM events e WHERE e.duration BETWEEN INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND INTERVAL '30 minutes';
SELECT id, SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM interval_value)) / 60 AS total_minutes FROM intervals GROUP BY id HAVING total_minutes > 5;
